expect.reason: Backlog item-mutations (claim/resolve/scaffold/settle/retype/yield/prepare-stamp) must run in a LANE clone, not the primary checkout — running backlog.mjs here mutates the item on primary and bypasses lane isolation (#2302/#104/#2219). cd into your lane clone (~/workspace/.lanes/<repo>/lane-N) and run it there. There is no override — #2219 ratified that nothing ever splices to primary (#2339).
